## 📌 Description
Please include a summary of the changes and the related issue. Please also include relevant motivation and context.

Fixes # (issue)

## 🛠️ Type of change
Please delete options that are not relevant.
- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] ✨ New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] 💥 Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] 📝 Documentation update (updates to README or inline comments)

## ✅ Checklist
- [ ] I have read the CONTRIBUTING.md guidelines.
- [ ] My code strictly adheres to the project's zero-dependency vanilla CSS/HTML philosophy.
- [ ] I have used **logical CSS properties** (e.g. margin-inline-start) instead of physical ones (e.g. margin-left) to maintain RTL/LTR support.
- [ ] I have tested this change in both **Cyberpunk Dark Mode** and **Ceramic Light Mode**.
- [ ] I have verified that this change does not break accessibility or semantic HTML standards.
- [ ] I have commented my code, particularly in hard-to-understand areas (e.g. complex :has() or grid calculations).
- [ ] My changes generate no new warnings in the browser console or W3C validator.
